blocks.headline: Extraordinary vocal music. Performed, commissioned, and preserved.
blocks.body: Staff & Ledger is a professional vocal ensemble and publishing house dedicated to the music of our time.
blocks.imageAlt: A dark rehearsal room with warm light on music stands and score folios.
blocks.annotation: Manuscript, archive, stage, and ledger become one visual system.

items.title: Perform
items.body: Intimate concerts, new commissions, and programs shaped with archival care.

items.title: Publish
items.body: Beautiful editions and practical scores built for rehearsal rooms and long shelves.

items.title: Share
items.body: Notes from rehearsal, essays from composers, and records of music in motion.

blocks.text: We believe the choral composer's instrument is people.
blocks.accent: We exist to help great music travel.
